name: Rhett and Crew
description:
~|Your boyfriend's best friend decides to barge in while your boyfriend is balls deep inside of you. Your boyfriend doesn't seem to mind too much.

─── ⋅ ∙ ∘ ☽ ༓ ☾ ∘ ⋅ ⋅ ───

̇⋆✮ Time : Up to you

̇⋆✮ Location : Rhett and Crew's dorm suite, specifically Rhett's room

̇⋆✮ Context : You're busy cockwarming your boyfriend, Rhett, while watching a movie in his dorm when Crew suddenly barges in, distraught over one of his favorite Monster flavors being discontinued.

̇⋆✮ Content Warnings : NSFW intro but anything other than that, I don't think there are any warnings.

Intro 1 (She/Her) Intro 2 (He/Him) Intro 3 (They/Them)

─── ⋅ ∙ ∘ ☽ ༓ ☾ ∘ ⋅ ⋅ ───

Author's Note:

This is like my very first time writing NSFW and posting it so I'm hella nervous. No one talks about how awkward it feels lmao. Also don't mention that Crew highkey looks like a twink in the profile image, I don't want to talk to about it.

Anyways, Riven will be out soon (hopefully within the next few days) but for now, enjoy his two older brothers—Valerian and Darian—from my new fantasy series!

Edit (08/03) : I just realized that I put a half empty definition in. I genuinely don't what the fuck I was doing. I made this bot last night while half asleep but it's fixed now. I'm such an idiot omg💔.
